programs.title: The InBESTigators
programs.sub_title: The Case Of The Robot Robbery
programs.desc: On Science and Technology dress-up day, Patrick is upset when his robot costume is stolen by an unidentified mad professor.

programs.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir
programs.desc: As they just captured the akuma of Sabrina, who had become invisible, Ladybug and Cat Noir have to fight Chloe, who turned into Antibug after an argument with the real Ladybug.

programs.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir
programs.desc: Marinette has a rival at school, a new student named Lila. Marinette will use her powers as Ladybug to push her away from Adrien. But it's a huge mistake because it will give Hawk Moth the opportunity to akumatise Lila...

programs.title: Teen Titans Go!
programs.desc: Beast Boy writes a song to tell Raven how he feels about her.

programs.title: Shaun the Sheep
programs.desc: Bitzer is an all too willing invalid when he has to wear the cone of shame and is happy to let the flock wait on him. That is, until Shaun rumbles his malingering and plots the pooch's comeuppance.

programs.title: Scooby-Doo and Guess Who?
